td.style: width:30%; text-align:left; vertical-align:middle; padding:4px 8px 4px 10px; border:1px solid #fff;
width:40%; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; padding-bottom:8px; border:1px solid #fff;

span.style: background:#714B67; color:#fff; padding:4px 14px; border-radius:4px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px;

td.style: width:30%; text-align:right; vertical-align:middle; direction:rtl; padding:4px 10px 4px 8px; border:1px solid #fff;

div.style: background-color:#fff3cd; border:1px solid #ffc107; padding:6px 10px; margin-bottom:8px; border-radius:4px; font-size:11px;
div.span: — This rental exceeded the planned return date.

span.style: background:#28a745; color:#fff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; font-size:11px;
background:#28a745; color:#fff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; font-size:11px;
background:#dc3545; color:#fff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; font-size:11px;

td.style: width:30%; text-align:left; vertical-align:middle; padding:3px 6px 3px 8px; border:1px solid #fff;
width:40%; text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; padding-bottom:6px; border:1px solid #fff;

span.style: background:#714B67; color:#fff; padding:1px 6px; border-radius:3px; font-size:6px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px;

td.style: width:30%; text-align:right; vertical-align:middle; direction:rtl; padding:3px 8px 3px 6px; border:1px solid #fff;

div.style: background-color:#fff3cd; border:1px solid #ffc107; padding:2px 4px; margin-bottom:3px; border-radius:3px; font-size:6px;
div.span: — This rental exceeded the planned return date.

span.style: background:#28a745; color:#fff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; font-size:11px;
background:#28a745; color:#fff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; font-size:11px;
background:#dc3545; color:#fff; padding:4px 12px; border-radius:4px; font-weight:700; font-size:11px;
